company.segment_en: The credible #2 in AI accelerators and the inference value-play — Instinct GPUs + EPYC server CPUs, a direct TSMC leading-edge & CoWoS customer competing with NVIDIA for the same allocation
company.segment_zh: AI 加速器市場可信的第二名、也是推論的「性價比」標的 — Instinct GPU＋EPYC 伺服器 CPU，台積電先進製程與 CoWoS 的直接客戶，與 NVIDIA 競逐同一批配額
company.blurb_en: Four pillars on the #2 AI-accelerator challenger: how AMD raises realized compute price (Instinct generational ASP · HBM-capacity inference premium · EPYC share gains · ~12GW OpenAI+Meta lock-in) and where the ROCm-vs-CUDA gap pushes back · what to watch it with · its ~$8B AI-GPU revenue (Instinct, an estimate) inside a disclosed $5.8B/qtr Data Center segment · and how ~100% is TSMC N3→N2 + CoWoS + HBM.
company.blurb_zh: 對「AI 加速器第二名挑戰者」的四支柱：AMD 怎麼提高已實現算力售價（Instinct 世代 ASP · HBM 容量推論溢價 · EPYC 市占擴張 · OpenAI＋Meta ~12GW 鎖定），以及 ROCm vs CUDA 差距如何反推 · 用什麼觀察 · 其 ~$8B AI-GPU 營收（Instinct，估計值）藏在已揭露的每季 $5.8B 資料中心分部內 · 以及這一切如何幾乎 100% 是台積電 N3→N2＋CoWoS＋HBM。

thesis_en: AMD is the credible #2 in AI accelerators and the inference value-play. Its edge is MEMORY: bigger HBM than NVIDIA every generation (288GB on MI355X vs 180GB on B200) lets customers run large models on fewer GPUs — a structural inference-TCO advantage as inference becomes ~2/3 of accelerator spend. Realized price rises through the Instinct generational ASP ramp (MI300→MI350→MI400/Helios), ~12GW of OpenAI + Meta commitments, and a record ~46% EPYC server-CPU share that funds the GPU push. The honest drag is ROCm: still trailing CUDA, so AMD prices as the value alternative to NVIDIA, not the price-maker — and the stock (~$559, +130% YTD, forward P/E ~62, the richest multiple of the big three) has run ahead of analyst targets, so the 2H-2026 MI400/Helios ramp must validate it. For TSMC, AMD is ~100% bound to N3→N2 + CoWoS + HBM, competing with NVIDIA for the same oversubscribed allocation.
thesis_zh: AMD 是 AI 加速器市場可信的第二名、也是推論的「性價比」標的。它的優勢在記憶體：每一代 HBM 容量都比 NVIDIA 大（MI355X 的 288GB vs B200 的 180GB），讓客戶用更少 GPU 跑大模型 — 當推論占加速器支出約 2/3，這是結構性的推論 TCO 優勢。已實現價格靠 Instinct 世代 ASP 階梯（MI300→MI350→MI400/Helios）、OpenAI＋Meta ~12GW 承諾、以及替 GPU 攻勢買單的 ~46% EPYC 伺服器 CPU 市占推升。誠實的拖累是 ROCm：仍落後 CUDA，所以 AMD 以「NVIDIA 的性價比替代品」定價、而非定價者 — 且股價（~$559、YTD +130%、前瞻本益比 ~62，三巨頭中最貴）已跑在分析師目標價之前，因此 2H-2026 的 MI400/Helios 放量必須兌現。對台積電而言，AMD ~100% 綁定 N3→N2＋CoWoS＋HBM，與 NVIDIA 競逐同一批超額認購的配額。
pricing_engine_note_en: the Instinct generational ASP ramp, AMD's HBM-capacity lead for inference, ~12GW of OpenAI+Meta lock-in and record EPYC server share are doing the work — AMD is the credible #2, pricing as the value alternative to NVIDIA rather than the price-maker
pricing_engine_note_zh: Instinct 世代 ASP 階梯、AMD 在推論的 HBM 容量領先、OpenAI＋Meta ~12GW 鎖定與創新高的 EPYC 伺服器市占在推動 — AMD 是可信的第二名，以「NVIDIA 的性價比替代品」定價、而非定價者

pricing_levers.name_en: Instinct generational ASP ramp (MI300 → MI350 → MI400)
pricing_levers.name_zh: Instinct 世代 ASP 階梯（MI300 → MI350 → MI400）
pricing_levers.mechanism_en: Each Instinct generation steps up capability and price: MI300X (192GB) → MI325X (256GB) → MI355X (288GB HBM3E, FP4/FP6, in production) → MI400/MI450 (HBM4, 2nm, ramping 2H 2026). The mix-shift to newer, higher-ASP parts raises realized price per GPU independent of any list-price move — the core engine as Data Center GPU revenue ramps.
pricing_levers.mechanism_zh: 每一代 Instinct 都在能力與價格上台階：MI300X（192GB）→ MI325X（256GB）→ MI355X（288GB HBM3E、FP4/FP6、量產中）→ MI400/MI450（HBM4、2nm、2H 2026 放量）。組合往更新、更高 ASP 的產品移動，與牌價無關地推升每顆 GPU 的已實現價格 — 是資料中心 GPU 營收放量時的核心引擎。
pricing_levers.observability_en: AMD Data Center segment revenue & growth, Instinct generation mix, MI355X/MI400 ramp commentary on earnings calls.
pricing_levers.observability_zh: AMD 資料中心分部營收與成長、Instinct 世代組合、法說會上 MI355X/MI400 放量評論。
pricing_levers.source_zh: AMD 季報與投資人資料

pricing_levers.name_en: HBM-capacity inference premium (more memory = fewer GPUs)
pricing_levers.name_zh: HBM 容量推論溢價（記憶體越大、用越少 GPU）
pricing_levers.mechanism_en: AMD has led NVIDIA on HBM capacity every generation (288GB MI355X vs 180GB B200, 141GB H200). For inference, more memory per GPU fits larger models / longer context on FEWER GPUs, cutting sharding overhead and TCO — the structural reason AMD can command price on memory-bound inference workloads even without the CUDA ecosystem.
pricing_levers.mechanism_zh: AMD 每一代的 HBM 容量都領先 NVIDIA（MI355X 288GB vs B200 180GB、H200 141GB）。對推論而言，每顆 GPU 記憶體越大，就能用更少 GPU 放下更大模型／更長上下文，降低分片負擔與 TCO — 這是 AMD 即便沒有 CUDA 生態、仍能在記憶體綁定的推論工作負載上要價的結構性原因。
pricing_levers.observability_en: HBM GB/GPU vs NVIDIA each generation, MLPerf/Signal65 inference benchmarks, named memory-bound inference wins (large-model serving).
pricing_levers.observability_zh: 每一代每顆 GPU 的 HBM GB 數 vs NVIDIA、MLPerf/Signal65 推論基準、具名的記憶體綁定推論勝出（大模型服務）。

pricing_levers.name_en: EPYC server-CPU share gains (the profitable base)
pricing_levers.name_zh: EPYC 伺服器 CPU 市占擴張（獲利基底）
pricing_levers.mechanism_en: EPYC reached a record ~46% of server-CPU REVENUE in Q1 2026 (from <1% in 2017). 'Venice' (Zen 6, TSMC N2, up to 256 cores) extends the lead. This high-margin, share-gaining franchise raises blended Data Center realized price and funds the Instinct push — a TAM AMD guides toward ~$120B by 2030.
pricing_levers.mechanism_zh: EPYC 在 2026 Q1 達到伺服器 CPU 營收約 46% 的新高（2017 年還 <1%）。「Venice」（Zen 6、台積電 N2、最高 256 核）延續領先。這個高毛利、持續搶市占的事業拉高混合資料中心已實現價格，並替 Instinct 攻勢買單 — AMD 指引此 TAM 到 2030 年約 $120B。
pricing_levers.observability_en: Mercury Research server-CPU revenue share, EPYC Venice ramp, Data Center segment CPU/GPU split commentary.
pricing_levers.observability_zh: Mercury Research 伺服器 CPU 營收市占、EPYC Venice 放量、資料中心分部 CPU/GPU 拆分評論。

pricing_levers.mechanism_en: OpenAI (6GW, multi-generation, warrants up to ~160M AMD shares) and Meta (6GW, custom MI450) together commit ~12GW of forward Instinct demand. These multi-year anchors lock volume and pricing reference points and validate AMD as a second source — the demand spine under the ASP ramp (with warrant dilution as the cost).
pricing_levers.mechanism_zh: OpenAI（6GW、多世代、認股權最高約 1.6 億股 AMD）與 Meta（6GW、客製 MI450）合計承諾約 12GW 的前瞻 Instinct 需求。這些多年期錨定鎖住量與定價參考點，並驗證 AMD 作為第二供應商 — 是 ASP 階梯底下的需求脊柱（代價是認股權稀釋）。
pricing_levers.observability_en: OpenAI/Meta deployment milestones, warrant vesting disclosures, new hyperscaler design wins (Microsoft/Oracle).
pricing_levers.observability_zh: OpenAI/Meta 部署里程碑、認股權行權揭露、新增雲端設計勝出（Microsoft/Oracle）。

pricing_levers.name_zh: Helios 機櫃整機（每次部署的含量）
pricing_levers.mechanism_en: Helios sells AMD as an integrated rack (72 MI455X-class GPUs, 31TB HBM4, 1.4 PB/s, EPYC Venice, UALink) rather than loose chips — AMD's answer to NVIDIA's NVL72. Rack-scale shifts the unit of sale up, raising dollar content and realized price per deployment as it ramps in 2H 2026.
pricing_levers.mechanism_zh: Helios 把 AMD 當成整櫃賣（72 顆 MI455X 級 GPU、31TB HBM4、1.4 PB/s、EPYC Venice、UALink），而非散裝晶片 — 是 AMD 對 NVIDIA NVL72 的回應。機櫃級把銷售單位往上抬，隨 2H 2026 放量提高每次部署的金額含量與已實現價格。
pricing_levers.observability_en: Helios shipment timing, rack ASP vs chip ASP, UALink/Open Rack adoption, MI455X volume.
pricing_levers.observability_zh: Helios 出貨時程、機櫃 ASP vs 晶片 ASP、UALink/Open Rack 採用、MI455X 出貨量。

pricing_levers.name_zh: ROCm vs CUDA 差距（性價比折價拖累）
pricing_levers.mechanism_en: ROCm 6.x reached near-parity for common inference workloads (vLLM/SGLang/HF support), but CUDA still leads decisively on ecosystem breadth, developer familiarity and time-to-productivity. To win against that lock-in, AMD must price BELOW NVIDIA as the value alternative — capping realized price even as capability matches. Software is AMD's #1 competitive gap.
pricing_levers.mechanism_zh: ROCm 6.x 在常見推論工作負載已接近持平（支援 vLLM/SGLang/HF），但 CUDA 在生態廣度、開發者熟悉度與上手速度仍明顯領先。要對抗這份鎖定，AMD 必須以「性價比替代品」定價、低於 NVIDIA — 即便能力追平也壓住已實現價格。軟體是 AMD 的頭號競爭差距。
pricing_levers.observability_en: ROCm adoption (vLLM/SGLang/framework support), AMD-vs-NVIDIA $/GPU and $/M-token gap, developer-mindshare signals.
pricing_levers.observability_zh: ROCm 採用（vLLM/SGLang/框架支援）、AMD vs NVIDIA 的每顆 GPU 與每百萬代幣價差、開發者心智占有訊號。
pricing_levers.source_en: ROCm release notes; SemiAnalysis cost models
pricing_levers.source_zh: ROCm 發行說明；SemiAnalysis 成本模型

data_sources.what_en: Data Center segment revenue & operating income (EPYC + Instinct bundled), total revenue, gross margin — the hard floor; Instinct itself is NOT broken out.
data_sources.what_zh: 資料中心分部營收與營益（EPYC＋Instinct 合併）、總營收、毛利 — 硬底；Instinct 本身未單獨揭露。

data_sources.name_zh: AMD 法說會與投資人資料
data_sources.what_en: Data Center growth guide, Instinct ramp & MI400/Helios timing, OpenAI/Meta commentary, server-CPU TAM — where management frames the AI story.
data_sources.what_zh: 資料中心成長指引、Instinct 放量與 MI400/Helios 時程、OpenAI/Meta 評論、伺服器 CPU TAM — 管理層框定 AI 故事的地方。

data_sources.name_zh: AMD 股價（Nasdaq）＋分析師目標價
data_sources.what_en: Live price, market cap, forward P/E (~62) vs NVDA/AVGO, consensus target (~$449, currently BELOW price) — the market's read on the MI400 ramp. Sentiment context, kept OUT of the score.
data_sources.what_zh: 即時價格、市值、前瞻本益比（~62）vs NVDA／AVGO、共識目標價（~$449，目前低於股價）— 市場對 MI400 放量的判讀。屬情緒情境，排除在分數外。

data_sources.name_zh: MLPerf Inference 與 SemiAnalysis 基準
data_sources.what_en: Independent (and AMD-commissioned) MI355X-vs-B200 tokens/sec and cost-per-token — the cross-check on the HBM-capacity inference premium.
data_sources.what_zh: 獨立（與 AMD 委託）的 MI355X vs B200 tok/s 與每代幣成本 — 對 HBM 容量推論溢價的交叉驗證。

data_sources.name_zh: 台積電營收與先進製程／CoWoS 揭露
data_sources.what_en: N3/N2 mix and CoWoS/HBM capacity — the supply ceiling AMD shares with NVIDIA; AMD+NVIDIA+Google+Amazon took >90% of CoWoS+HBM by value in 2025.
data_sources.what_zh: N3/N2 結構與 CoWoS/HBM 產能 — AMD 與 NVIDIA 共用的供給天花板；2025 年 AMD＋NVIDIA＋Google＋Amazon 吃下 CoWoS＋HBM 價值的 >90%。

data_sources.name_zh: Mercury Research 伺服器 CPU 市占
data_sources.what_en: Quarterly EPYC vs Intel server-CPU unit & revenue share — the EPYC-lever observation point (record ~46% revenue share Q1 2026).
data_sources.what_zh: 每季 EPYC vs Intel 伺服器 CPU 出貨與營收市占 — EPYC 槓桿的觀測點（2026 Q1 營收市占創新高約 46%）。

data_sources.name_zh: OpenAI／Meta 承諾與認股權揭露
data_sources.what_en: The ~12GW forward Instinct book, deployment milestones, and OpenAI warrant (up to ~160M shares) vesting — demand anchors AND dilution cost.
data_sources.what_zh: ~12GW 前瞻 Instinct 訂單、部署里程碑、OpenAI 認股權（最高約 1.6 億股）行權 — 既是需求錨定，也是稀釋成本。

data_sources.name_zh: ROCm 發行說明與框架支援
data_sources.what_en: ROCm version cadence and vLLM/SGLang/HF/Modular support — the software-gap lever, narrowing fastest in inference.
data_sources.what_zh: ROCm 版本節奏與 vLLM/SGLang/HF/Modular 支援 — 軟體差距槓桿，在推論端收斂最快。

benefit_estimates.method_zh: 資料中心 GPU（Instinct）營收年化
benefit_estimates.basis_en: AMD does NOT break out Instinct separately, so this ~$8B is a third-party ESTIMATE of 2025 Data Center GPU revenue, ramping hard with MI350/MI400. Comparable to NVIDIA DC GPU and Broadcom AI-semi run-rates. For the demand-side coverage view see /payback; for inference-share backdrop see /compute.
benefit_estimates.basis_zh: AMD 未單獨揭露 Instinct，故此 ~$8B 為第三方對 2025 資料中心 GPU 營收的估計，隨 MI350/MI400 大幅放量。可與 NVIDIA DC GPU、Broadcom AI 半導體年化對比。需求端覆蓋率視角見 /payback；推論占比背景見 /compute。

benefit_estimates.method_en: Data Center SEGMENT revenue run-rate (disclosed; EPYC + Instinct)
benefit_estimates.method_zh: 資料中心「分部」營收年化（揭露值；EPYC＋Instinct）
benefit_estimates.basis_en: AMD discloses the Data Center SEGMENT: $5.8B in Q1 2026 (+57% YoY), annualizing to ~$23B. This bundles EPYC server CPUs WITH Instinct GPUs, so it is the disclosed floor — not AI-accelerator-only. Only the annualization is a projection.
benefit_estimates.basis_zh: AMD 揭露資料中心「分部」：2026 Q1 為 $5.8B（+57% YoY），年化約 $23B。它把 EPYC 伺服器 CPU 與 Instinct GPU 合併，因此是揭露的硬底 — 非純 AI 加速器。唯一推估是年化。

benefit_estimates.basis_en: OpenAI (6GW) + Meta (6GW) = ~12GW of multi-year Instinct commitments. The dollar value is a PRESS ESTIMATE (Meta alone reported >$100B potential; OpenAI 'tens of billions'), GW-based not AMD-disclosed, and OpenAI carries warrant dilution up to ~10%. A directional anchor, not a booked number.
benefit_estimates.basis_zh: OpenAI（6GW）＋Meta（6GW）＝約 12GW 多年期 Instinct 承諾。金額為媒體估計（光 Meta 報導潛在 >$100B；OpenAI「數百億」），以 GW 計、非 AMD 揭露，且 OpenAI 帶最高約 10% 認股權稀釋。為方向性錨點、非入帳數字。

benefit_disclosure_en: AMD does NOT break out Instinct (AI-GPU) revenue — the ~$8B headline is a third-party ESTIMATE. AMD discloses the Data Center SEGMENT ($5.8B in Q1 2026, +57% YoY) which bundles EPYC server CPUs with Instinct. The OpenAI (6GW) + Meta (6GW) ~12GW commitments are the forward driver (with warrant dilution as the cost).
benefit_disclosure_zh: AMD 未單獨揭露 Instinct（AI-GPU）營收 — ~$8B 頭條為第三方估計。AMD 揭露的是資料中心「分部」（2026 Q1 $5.8B、+57% YoY），它把 EPYC 伺服器 CPU 與 Instinct 合併。OpenAI（6GW）＋Meta（6GW）的 ~12GW 承諾是前瞻驅動（代價是認股權稀釋）。

silicon_chain.role_zh: 當前 AI 訓練＋推論旗艦
silicon_chain.note_en: 288GB HBM3E (vs 180GB B200), FP4/FP6, in production. The HBM-capacity lead is the inference-TCO edge — and it is as TSMC-N3 + CoWoS-bound as any NVIDIA GPU.
silicon_chain.note_zh: 288GB HBM3E（vs B200 180GB）、FP4/FP6、量產中。HBM 容量領先是推論 TCO 優勢 — 而它與任何 NVIDIA GPU 一樣綁死台積電 N3＋CoWoS。

silicon_chain.role_zh: 次世代加速器、Helios 機櫃
silicon_chain.note_en: Sampling; production ramp 2H 2026. Pushes AMD onto TSMC 2nm + HBM4 — the make-or-break ramp the rich multiple is priced on. Node/HBM4 capacity are roadmap-attributed.
silicon_chain.note_zh: 送樣中；2H 2026 量產放量。把 AMD 推上台積電 2nm＋HBM4 — 那個被昂貴本益比定價的成敗放量。節點／HBM4 容量為路線圖歸因。

silicon_chain.note_en: 192GB / 256GB HBM, shipping since 2024 — the multi-die chiplet design that proved AMD's CoWoS + HBM packaging at scale.
silicon_chain.note_zh: 192GB／256GB HBM，2024 起出貨 — 證明 AMD CoWoS＋HBM 封裝可規模化的多晶粒 chiplet 設計。

silicon_chain.role_zh: 資料中心 CPU 事業（另一半）
silicon_chain.note_en: Up to 256 cores on TSMC 2nm; record ~46% server-CPU revenue share. An early, high-volume N2 customer — and the profitable base that funds the GPU push.
silicon_chain.note_zh: 台積電 2nm 上最高 256 核；伺服器 CPU 營收市占創新高約 46%。是 N2 的早期、高量客戶 — 也是替 GPU 攻勢買單的獲利基底。

silicon_chain.role_en: Integrated AI rack (72 GPU + EPYC + UALink)
silicon_chain.role_zh: 整合 AI 機櫃（72 GPU＋EPYC＋UALink）
silicon_chain.note_en: 72 MI455X-class GPUs, 31TB HBM4, 1.4 PB/s — AMD's answer to NVL72. Every die inside is TSMC leading-edge; rack-scale raises TSMC content per deployment.
silicon_chain.note_zh: 72 顆 MI455X 級 GPU、31TB HBM4、1.4 PB/s — AMD 對 NVL72 的回應。櫃內每顆晶粒都是台積電先進製程；機櫃級提高每次部署的台積電含量。

silicon_chain.note_en: The open-standard answer to NVLink — the interconnect that lets Helios scale, also on TSMC silicon. Maturity vs NVLink is a watch item.
silicon_chain.note_zh: 對 NVLink 的開放標準回應 — 讓 Helios 得以擴張的互連，同樣跑在台積電矽上。相對 NVLink 的成熟度是觀察項。

silicon_summary_en: Instinct MI350 (N3) → MI400 (N2), EPYC Venice (N2), all CoWoS + HBM3E/HBM4. ~100% TSMC and CoWoS/HBM-bound — AMD competes with NVIDIA for the SAME oversubscribed allocation.
silicon_summary_zh: Instinct MI350（N3）→ MI400（N2）、EPYC Venice（N2），全為 CoWoS＋HBM3E/HBM4。約 100% 台積電、且綁定 CoWoS／HBM — AMD 與 NVIDIA 競逐同一批超額認購的配額。
tsmc_read_en: AMD is ~100% TSMC-bound for advanced logic AND packaging: Instinct on N3 (MI350) → N2 (MI400), EPYC 'Venice' on N2, all CoWoS-packaged with HBM3E/HBM4. For TSMC, AMD is the #2 pillar of leading-edge AI-GPU demand and one of the earliest high-volume N2 customers (Venice + MI400). Crucially, AMD does NOT relieve TSMC's CoWoS bottleneck — it DEEPENS it: AMD, NVIDIA, Google and Amazon together consumed >90% of global CoWoS + HBM by value in 2025, and the two GPU makers compete for the SAME oversubscribed allocation. So whether buyers diversify toward AMD or stay with NVIDIA, TSMC fabs both — AMD is a second source for TSMC's customers, never a second source for TSMC itself, and the CoWoS/HBM ceiling stays the binding constraint TSMC controls.
tsmc_read_zh: AMD 在先進邏輯「與」封裝上 ~100% 綁定台積電：Instinct 走 N3（MI350）→ N2（MI400），EPYC「Venice」走 N2，全部以 CoWoS 搭配 HBM3E/HBM4 封裝。對台積電而言，AMD 是先進製程 AI-GPU 需求的第二根支柱，也是最早的高量 N2 客戶之一（Venice＋MI400）。關鍵是，AMD 並不紓解台積電的 CoWoS 瓶頸，反而加深它：2025 年 AMD、NVIDIA、Google 與 Amazon 合計吃下全球 CoWoS＋HBM 價值的 >90%，而兩家 GPU 廠競逐同一批超額認購的配額。因此無論買家轉向 AMD 還是續留 NVIDIA，台積電都製造兩者 — AMD 是台積電「客戶」的第二供應商、卻永遠不是台積電自己的第二供應商，CoWoS／HBM 天花板仍是台積電掌握的綁定約束。

cross_links.label_en: NVIDIA lens — the #1 AMD prices against; compare the two GPU price-makers side by side

scenarios_seed.trigger_en: MI400/Helios ramps on schedule in 2H 2026, OpenAI + Meta ~12GW convert to revenue, AMD captures ~25%+ of the merchant accelerator market, and ROCm closes enough of the inference gap to win serving workloads.
scenarios_seed.trigger_zh: MI400/Helios 在 2H 2026 如期放量，OpenAI＋Meta ~12GW 轉為營收，AMD 拿下商用加速器市場約 25%+，且 ROCm 收斂足夠多推論差距、贏下服務工作負載。

scenarios_seed.name_zh: 記憶體溢價再定價／利潤擴張
scenarios_seed.trigger_en: The HBM-capacity lead and Helios rack content lift blended Instinct ASP and Data Center margin even as units grow — realized price rises faster than volume discounts.
scenarios_seed.trigger_zh: HBM 容量領先與 Helios 機櫃含量拉高混合 Instinct ASP 與資料中心利潤，即使出貨成長 — 已實現價格漲得比量價折讓快。

scenarios_seed.name_en: CoWoS / HBM bottleneck caps the ramp
scenarios_seed.trigger_en: AMD competes with NVIDIA for the same oversubscribed TSMC CoWoS + HBM allocation; design wins can't ship — AMD wins the deals but is supply-gated through 2027.
scenarios_seed.trigger_zh: AMD 與 NVIDIA 競逐同一批超額認購的台積電 CoWoS＋HBM 配額；設計勝出卻出不了貨 — AMD 贏了案子卻被供給卡到 2027。

scenarios_seed.name_en: NVIDIA price-war / digestion / ROCm gap persists
scenarios_seed.name_zh: NVIDIA 價格戰／消化／ROCm 差距仍在
scenarios_seed.trigger_en: NVIDIA's Blackwell-Rubin cadence + price war and an AI-capex digestion compress AMD's rich (~62x) multiple, while ROCm still trails CUDA — AMD stays stuck as the value discounter.
scenarios_seed.trigger_zh: NVIDIA 的 Blackwell-Rubin 節奏＋價格戰與 AI capex 消化壓縮 AMD 昂貴的（~62 倍）本益比，同時 ROCm 仍落後 CUDA — AMD 困在性價比折價者角色。

falsification_seed.en: An anchor (OpenAI or Meta) cuts/delays its multi-GW Instinct commitment or shifts back to NVIDIA / a custom ASIC — the ~12GW forward book cracks.
falsification_seed.zh: 一個錨定客戶（OpenAI 或 Meta）削減／延後其多 GW Instinct 承諾或轉回 NVIDIA／自研 ASIC — ~12GW 前瞻訂單出現裂縫。

falsification_seed.en: ROCm fails to close the inference gap and NVIDIA Rubin reclaims memory parity — AMD's value-alternative edge evaporates, forcing deeper price discounts.
falsification_seed.zh: ROCm 未能收斂推論差距、NVIDIA Rubin 追平記憶體容量 — AMD 的性價比優勢蒸發，被迫更深折價。

falsification_seed.en: Data Center GPU gross margin compresses as AMD discounts to win share — the 'raising realized price' thesis fails.
falsification_seed.zh: AMD 為搶市占折價、資料中心 GPU 毛利壓縮 — 「提高已實現價格」論點失效。

blind_spots_en: AMD does NOT break out Instinct (AI-GPU) revenue — the ~$8B headline is a third-party estimate; only the Data Center segment (EPYC + Instinct) is disclosed.
Multi-GW OpenAI/Meta commitments are GW-based; dollar values (>$100B Meta) are press estimates, and OpenAI warrant dilution (up to ~10%) is a real cost.
Benchmark claims (MI355X ~1.3x B200) are largely AMD-commissioned / vendor-influenced.
Node/packaging for MI400 (N2) and HBM4 capacity (~432GB) are roadmap / industry-attributed, not AMD/TSMC-confirmed.
The stock has run +130% YTD ahead of analyst targets (~$449 avg below ~$559 price); live AMD/NVDA/TSM proxies are sentiment context, kept out of the pricing-power score.
blind_spots_zh: AMD 未單獨揭露 Instinct（AI-GPU）營收 — ~$8B 頭條為第三方估計；只有資料中心分部（EPYC＋Instinct）是揭露值。
多 GW 的 OpenAI/Meta 承諾以 GW 計；金額（Meta >$100B）為媒體估計，且 OpenAI 認股權稀釋（最高約 10%）是真實成本。
基準宣稱（MI355X ~1.3x B200）多為 AMD 委託／廠商影響。
MI400（N2）的節點／封裝與 HBM4 容量（~432GB）為路線圖／產業歸因，非 AMD／台積電確認。
股價 YTD +130% 已跑在分析師目標價之前（均 ~$449 低於 ~$559 股價）；即時 AMD/NVDA/TSM proxy 為情緒情境，排除在定價權分數外。
